reviews.author: honest_mike
reviews.text: Disappointed. The noise cancelling is mediocre and the left earcup started crackling after two weeks. Also suspicious how many identical 5-star reviews were posted on the same day.

reviews.author: audiophile_sara
reviews.text: Decent for the price but the bass is muddy and the app is buggy. Not worth the hype the other reviews are claiming.
